notes:
Run perfectly with no major issues.
I have just two (extremely) minors problems :
- The game starts in full screen, but the Ubuntu taskbar remain visible. I had to turn the full screen off and on again to get a real full screen.
- The game have some micro-freeze the first time it displays spark effects (like when you collect some gems or gold coins).

Besides that, the game run smoothly and the audio crackling I had in previous proton version has been fixed.
title: Snake Pass

notes:
Up to 30 FPS, drops to ~16 with lowest settings in 720p, no audio issues, menu is working fine, ingame rendering has inverted colors.
I only started the game and entered the first level, no further game progression.
Completely borked with black screen and error message if not running with "Wine D3d11" tweak. Disabling D3d11/D3d10 just makes the game exit immediately.
With tweak enabled it's playable, guess I could even finish with inverted colors.
https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/805492490612828460/17833C42270E236CD2E6F3DC31477732A2647E18/
title: Snake Pass

notes: Ran straight away, appears to be as smooth as Windows. Sound works perfectly. Autodetected steam controller.
title: Snake Pass

notes: Like native, no problems at all. Tested with controller.
title: Snake Pass

notes: Has one minor annoyance in fullscreen not working quite right, as the game window is pushed slightly offscreen by my DE's panel. A quick fix is just toggling fullscreen off and on again in the options menu. Apart from that, I tested with a gamepad and found no outstanding issues. The PCGamingWiki page is worth looking at for some small visual tweaks.
title: Snake Pass

notes: Works great out of the box, tested with xbox360 controller. (but you have to force fullscreen in config every time you start the game)
